title: Logical error: 'Sizes of nested column and null map of Nullable column are not equal' with Buffers format
description:
### Describe the bug
In this test case, I insert into a Nullable Int column from a buffer without NULL values. The Logical error happens on the client side. Maybe something is missing cc @nihalzp
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Nullable(Int)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION file('/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/table.data', 'Buffers', 'c0 Int') SELECT 1;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0(c0) FROM INFILE '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/table.data' FORMAT Buffers;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
Logical error: 'Sizes of nested column and null map of Nullable column are not equal'.
Format string: 'Sizes of nested column and null map of Nullable column are not equal'.
Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d642813
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x000000000d6516b9
5. src/Columns/ColumnNullable.cpp:921: DB::ColumnNullable::checkConsistency() const @ 0x000000001e7c3466
6. src/DataTypes/Serializations/SerializationNullable.cpp:104: DB::SerializationNullable::serializeBinaryBulkWithMultipleStreams(DB::IColumn const&, unsigned long, unsigned long, DB::ISerialization::SerializeBinaryBulkSettings&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ISerialization::SerializeBinaryBulkState>&) const @ 0x000000001af67e11
7. src/Formats/NativeWriter.cpp:101: DB::NativeWriter::writeData(DB::ISerialization const&, COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn> const&, DB::WriteBuffer&, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings> const&, unsigned long, unsigned long, unsigned long) @ 0x000000001fba8ce9
8. src/Formats/NativeWriter.cpp:224: DB::NativeWriter::write(DB::Block const&) @ 0x000000001fba9b8a
9. src/Client/Connection.cpp:1059: DB::Connection::sendData(DB::Block const&, String const&, bool) @ 0x000000001f95b883
10. src/Client/ClientBase.cpp:2101: DB::ClientBase::sendDataFromPipe(DB::Pipe&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, bool) @ 0x000000001f920a7f
11. src/Client/ClientBase.cpp:1985: DB::ClientBase::sendData(DB::Block&, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>) @ 0x000000001f91f887
12. src/Client/ClientBase.cpp:1855: DB::ClientBase::processInsertQuery(String, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>) @ 0x000000001f91df98
13. src/Client/ClientBase.cpp:2342: DB::ClientBase::processParsedSingleQuery(std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>, bool&, unsigned long) @ 0x000000001f916cb0

16. src/Client/ClientBase.cpp:3678: DB::ClientBase::runInteractive() @ 0x000000001f92cefd
17. programs/client/Client.cpp:402: DB::Client::main(std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&) @ 0x0000000015f21a56
18. base/poco/Util/src/Application.cpp:315: Poco::Util::Application::run() @ 0x0000000025ffac31
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c1_null BOOLEAN) USING MEMORY;
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c1_null) VALUES (NULL, 'test', TRUE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c1_null) VALUES (1, 'example', FALSE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c1_null) VALUES (2, 'buffered', FALSE);
key_bug_features: Inserting into Nullable column from Buffers format
